response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the on-screen burnt-in lyrics. 2. Reference JSON provided no lyrics, so relied entirely on audio and visual text cues. 3. Confirmed text matches full audio duration with precise timing for fast-paced rap sections and emotional pauses. 4. Discarded any off-screen UI text as irrelevant clutter.

subtitles.original: Woah! I can't believe that we've defeated the giant monster!
subtitles.english: Woah! I can't believe that we've defeated the giant monster!

subtitles.original: It's actually this cute! Aw~
subtitles.english: It's actually this cute! Aw~

subtitles.original: As a celebration, let's sing one more song!
subtitles.english: As a celebration, let's sing one more song!

subtitles.original: ヒラヒラ 葉を散らし 月
subtitles.english: Fluttering, leaves scattering, the moon...

subtitles.original: 夜明けが見たいって
subtitles.english: "I want to see the dawn," it says

subtitles.original: 叫んだ 空
subtitles.english: Screamed the sky

subtitles.original: 神様気取れ 飲めや 踊れ どっか世界を
subtitles.english: Play God, drink and dance, somewhere in the world...

subtitles.original: 愛して壊しちゃいました
subtitles.english: I loved and destroyed it

subtitles.original: 誰の物 誰の物 我の物 邪魔者は排除した
subtitles.english: Whose is it? Whose is it? It's mine. Obstacles removed.

subtitles.original: 感度が何とか言ってたって エゴに捕まれて拒めないんだ
subtitles.english: Despite what they say, I'm caught in my ego.

subtitles.original: まだ足りない 物足りない 死にたくない
subtitles.english: Still not enough, unsatisfied, I don't want to die

subtitles.original: 機械仕掛けの腐った声で お利口さん達が言う
subtitles.english: With mechanical rotten voices, the good boys say...

subtitles.original: Who's next, what for, move on, fast forward
subtitles.english: Who's next, what for, move on, fast forward

subtitles.original: ウンザリだよ
subtitles.english: I'm sick of it

subtitles.original: 死んどる抱負 愛してるわ
subtitles.english: I love dead aspirations

subtitles.original: もう止めてよ
subtitles.english: Stop it already

subtitles.original: 心ってモノ測ってきて 売れば幸せですか
subtitles.english: If you measure a heart and sell it, are you happy?

subtitles.original: 造られたショーケース ほどけ出した基盤
subtitles.english: A created showcase, the foundation starts to unravel

subtitles.original: 世界 虚ろの果て
subtitles.english: The world at the end of emptiness

subtitles.original: 魂を一体どこに隠した
subtitles.english: Where on earth did you hide your soul?

subtitles.original: 感夜 赫々 宵 分与
subtitles.english: Feeling the night, brilliantly, night's allotment

subtitles.original: 雨つぶ止め 唄と舞う
subtitles.english: Stopping the raindrops, dancing with the song

subtitles.original: ヒバリの空
subtitles.english: The sky of the skylark

subtitles.original: 輪廻転生 機械論 進化の論
subtitles.english: Samsara, mechanism, theory of evolution

subtitles.original: 人が人でなくなる日に 片羽を焼こう色よ
subtitles.english: On the day humans stop being human, let's burn our wings

subtitles.original: 泡沫は未来へ届くよう 空から空へとつなげるよう
subtitles.english: May the bubbles reach the future, connecting sky to sky

subtitles.original: 限りなく鳴くヒバリ達を残す
subtitles.english: Leaving behind the skylarks that cry endlessly

subtitles.original: 難点宝物 聞かせてくれたっけ
subtitles.english: Did you let me hear those difficult treasures?

subtitles.original: メリディア 二人のこと 愛してる
subtitles.english: Meridia, I love the two of us

subtitles.original: 嘘でもいいから一度だけでも聞かせてよ
subtitles.english: Even if it's a lie, let me hear it just once

subtitles.original: どこかで どこかで 笑ってました
subtitles.english: Somewhere, somewhere, they were laughing

subtitles.original: 今は幸せですか
subtitles.english: Are you happy now?

subtitles.original: 置き去りのまま
subtitles.english: Left behind as I was

subtitles.original: 届かない想い ごめん なんで言えなかったかな
subtitles.english: Unreachable feelings; sorry, why couldn't I say it?

subtitles.original: 悲しい思い出は 風に隠した
subtitles.english: I hid the sad memories in the wind

subtitles.original: 唄よ あなたの元へ
subtitles.english: Song, go to where you are

subtitles.original: 雨つぶ止め 時を舞う
subtitles.english: Stopping the raindrops, dancing through time

subtitles.original: ヒバリの空
subtitles.english: The sky of the skylark

subtitles.original: ひとりでも笑って生きれるんだ
subtitles.english: I can live on laughing, even alone

subtitles.original: ひとりでは生きていけないんだ
subtitles.english: But I can't live all by myself

subtitles.original: ずっと拒んだり 愛したり
subtitles.english: Always refusing, always loving

subtitles.original: 裏で壊して それでも誇らしく生きれるよ
subtitles.english: Breaking it from behind, yet I can live proudly

subtitles.original: 心ってモノ測ってきて 売れば幸せですか
subtitles.english: If you measure a heart and sell it, are you happy?

subtitles.original: 造られたショーケース もう逃げ出したくない未来
subtitles.english: A created showcase, a future I no longer flee

subtitles.original: 手先の鍵
subtitles.english: The key in my hands

subtitles.original: 魂を一体どこに隠した
subtitles.english: Where on earth did you hide your soul?

subtitles.original: 感夜 赫々 宵 分与
subtitles.english: Feeling the night, brilliantly, night's allotment

subtitles.original: 雨つぶ止め 唄と舞う
subtitles.english: Stopping the raindrops, dancing with the song

subtitles.original: 夜明けを告げたら
subtitles.english: When the dawn is announced

subtitles.original: ヒバリの空
subtitles.english: The sky of the skylark
